examples: The outdoor swimming pool is also used as firewater reservoir.
The feasibility to reduce the ice point of firewater for freezing protection is discussed.
Pero had made the firewater himself ... with green walnuts. Slugging down a shot he hands me a glass, wheezing, "Walnut grappa -- it recovers your energy."
The mahout riding the lead elephant, armed with a shotgun, was fuelled with local firewater.
But I had been looking forward to Firewater's performance for a long time.
